title: U24 Spectral Operator: Verification Data and Analysis
description: Complete verification data, analysis notebooks, and reproducibility scripts for three companion papers: 'A Spectral Operator for the Riemann Hypothesis' (v14.1), 'Complete Proofs: Spectral Operator Approach to RH' (v1.1), and 'The Universality Constant: Eleven Paths to Omega = 24' (v1.3). Includes 20+ data files across 9 subdirectories (including gap-verification/), 8 Jupyter notebooks, and figure-regeneration scripts. v1.1 corrects Proposition 9.4 (o(1) not exact 0), resolves Issue B6 (TRS verified), and adds secular equation zero matching (169/169 at 0.23%). All analysis reproducible with standard scientific Python.
